title: Mobile Post Office Relief Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
crs_summary: Mobile Post Office Relief Act This bill requires the U.S. Postal Service, under specified circumstances, to provide certain postal services by way of a vehicle or mobile facility when an existing postal retail facility is temporarily not providing such services.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
